# pii_financial corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.
# Card PANs are standard Luhn-valid network test numbers (the brand
# patterns are now Mod-10 gated, so a non-Luhn placeholder would not fire).

# === Visa ===
# expect: Visa Card
Card 4111111111111111 on file.

# === Mastercard ===
# expect: Mastercard Card
Card 5555555555554444 on file.

# === Mastercard 2-series ===
# expect: Mastercard Card
Card 2223003122003222 on file.

# === Discover ===
# expect: Discover Card
Card 6011111111111117 on file.

# === American Express ===
# expect: American Express Card
Card 378282246310005 on file.

# === Diners Club ===
# expect: Diners Club Card
Card 30569309025904 on file.

# === JCB ===
# expect: JCB Card
Card 3530111333300000 on file.

# === UnionPay ===
# expect: UnionPay Card
Card 6212345678901234 on file.

# === Maestro ===
# expect: Maestro Card
Card 6759649826438453 on file.

# === Dankort ===
# expect: Dankort Card
Card 5019717010103742 on file.

# === Mir ===
# expect: Mir Card
Card 2200123456789019 on file.

# === UATP ===
# expect: UATP Card (labeled)
UATP: 100000000000008 on file.

# === IBAN generic ===
# expect: IBAN
Beneficiary NL91ABNA0417164300 please.

# === IBAN Germany ===
# expect: IBAN (Germany)
# expect: IBAN
Beneficiary DE89370400440532013000 please.

# === IBAN United Kingdom ===
# expect: IBAN (United Kingdom)
# expect: IBAN
Beneficiary GB29NWBK60161331926819 please.

# === IBAN France ===
# expect: IBAN (France)
# expect: IBAN
Beneficiary FR1420041010050500013M02606 please.

# === IBAN Italy ===
# expect: IBAN (Italy)
# expect: IBAN
Beneficiary IT60X0542811101000000123456 please.

# === IBAN Spain ===
# expect: IBAN (Spain)
# expect: IBAN
Beneficiary ES9121000418450200051332 please.

# === BIC / SWIFT ===
# expect: BIC / SWIFT (labeled)
BIC: DEUTDEFF500 for the transfer.

# === US Routing ===
# expect: US Bank Routing Number (labeled)
routing number: 021000021 here.

# === US Account ===
# expect: US Bank Account Number (labeled)
account number: 12345678 here.

# === UK Sort Code ===
# expect: UK Sort Code (labeled)
sort code: 40-47-84 here.

# === SEPA Creditor Identifier ===
# expect: SEPA Creditor Identifier (labeled)
# A SEPA Creditor ID is NOT a valid IBAN: the iban_mod97 gate (Block 5)
# correctly stops the old loose "IBAN" pattern from over-matching it.
creditor id: DE98ZZZ09999999999 here.

# === Card PAN co-located with expiry/CVV (Block 4c, Luhn-gated) ===
# expect: Card PAN with Expiry/CVV
pay 4111 1111 1111 1111 exp 12/25
card 4111111111111111 cvv 123
